results.name: Oracle Corporation
results.key_finding: Jun 15 sign-or-forfeit severance deadline is the culmination of the same 30K-layoff/coercive-severance event that already set 14.7 — no new in-window basis; no double-count.

results.name: OpenAI
results.key_finding: 42-state AG subpoena (Jun 12, sycophancy/minors/age-verification) is a broad but pre-adjudication allegation; conservative reconstruct 25.9 (delta -1.6 < 5) — sub-dimension pressure on ACC/AWR within Developing band.

results.name: Bolivia
results.key_finding: State-of-exception law authorises but has not actually deployed the military (JURIST Jun 8); law + 9 deaths already set 6.3; near-floor confirmation, not new escalation.

results.name: Democratic Republic of Congo
results.key_finding: Ebola PHEIC (676 cases/136 deaths, spread to a displacement camp) is incremental progression of the crisis that set 5.9 Jun 14; near-floor; WHO/Africa CDC response active.

results.name: Russia
results.key_finding: OVD-Info + 35 orgs 'extremist' designation (HRW Jun 5) reinforces the existing 0 floor; no downside room.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: Ceasefire violations and aid curbs ongoing; already at 0 floor with no downside room.

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: Detentions, strikes, sanctions ongoing; no new in-window mover; near-floor.

results.name: Palestine
results.key_finding: Aid blockage and infrastructure destruction ongoing; floor set Jun 14; no new acute in-window escalation.

results.name: United States
results.key_finding: Big Ugly Law / ICE / Medicaid-SNAP cuts are 2025 enactments; ICE Jun 4 reporting rescission noted but not a >=5 composite mover this window.

results.name: Anthropic
results.key_finding: Fable 5 / Mythos 5 suspended Jun 12 by US Commerce export-control directive; Anthropic complied promptly and apologised — government-compelled, net-neutral to its own compassion conduct.

results.name: Ukraine
results.key_finding: Active conflict continues (Jun 2 Kyiv attack, 22 killed) but no structural change to state compassion infrastructure in-window.

results.name: Nigeria
results.key_finding: 34.7M acute food insecurity / Borno IPC Phase 5 — WFP source dated Jan 2026 (outside window); scan noted no new acute escalation vs Jun 14.

results.name: Burkina Faso
results.key_finding: Sahel lean season active; regional FAO/WFP figures; score set Jun 14; near-floor.

results.name: Chad
results.key_finding: Refugee load, lean season and WFP funding crisis ongoing; near-floor; no new in-window mover.

results.name: Mali
results.key_finding: 64% hunger surge / ration cuts and junta governance failure ongoing; near-floor.

results.name: Amazon
results.key_finding: EEOC findings (pregnant Feb; disabled Apr 23) are pre-window/pre-adjudication and consistent with the 17.8 Critical profile; Jun lawsuit spotlight is advocacy-tier.
